generated_report.report_summary: Expense Reduction Report: To meet the $150 monthly savings target, suggested cuts include: (1) Cancel streaming subscription ($45), (2) Reduce coffee spending from $80 to $30 ($50 cut), and (3) Reduce restaurant spending from $150 to $95 ($55 cut). These cuts target discretionary spending while preserving all priority categories and respecting preferences to avoid cuts from health and gym.

suggestions.reason: Cancel streaming subscription - entertainment is discretionary spending
Reduce coffee spending from $80 to $30 by brewing at home 2-3x per week
Reduce restaurant spending from $150 to $95 by dining out 1 fewer time per week
